dyad_name: Government of Russia (Soviet Union) - Government of Ukraine
source_article: "depo Kyiv,2022-02-27,The column of occupiers is blocked: the Armed Forces blew up… Ukrainians shoot at Russian armored vehicles in Bucha. Photo: Andriy Tsaplienko_Facebook The Armed Forces blew up the bridge between Bucha and Irpen , the column of occupiers was blocked. This was reported by Depo.Kyiv with reference to a post by journalist Andriy Tsaplienko in the Telegram.  According to Tsaplienko, Ukrainians are firing on Russian armored vehicles in Bucha.  The journalist later reported that near the village of Babintsi, Bucha district, the Russian military opened fire on a car with civilians. One man was killed and another wounded.  "Attention! The occupiers shot dead a civilian car !!! Near the village of Babintsi, Bucha district, the Russian military opened fire on a car with civilians. One man was killed and another was wounded," the statement said.   We will remind, defenders of Ukraine recaptured the city of Irpin.  The information that our troops repulsed the enemy's attack was confirmed by the mayor Oleksandr Markushin."
source_headline: The column of occupiers is blocked: the Armed Forces blew up… Ukrainians shoot at Russian armored vehicles in Bucha. Photo: Andriy Tsaplienko_Facebook The Armed Forces blew up the bridge between Bucha and Irpen , the column of occupiers was blocked. The information that our troops repulsed the enemy's attack was confirmed by the mayor Oleksandr Markushin.
